name: claude-code-diagnosis
description: Diagnose your own Claude Code usage and benchmark it against Anthropic's published per-developer figures. Parses local transcripts into cost, tokens, sessions, model mix, tool distribution, cache efficiency, thinking and subagent rates, per-project and per-week breakdowns, and renders an interactive HTML dashboard with a percentile placement. Cost reconciles to within ~1% of ccusage. No network, no account access.
